scene.message: Elly: Oh my God...{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Ngh...{wait_fr:60}{nl} You...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Kandori, you...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...How awful.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Like hell we'll{nl} let you!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: We won't allow it!{waitkey}{ret}
Kandori: How futile...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Inaba! Nanjo!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Ngh...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Y...{wait_fr:60}you bastard...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Wait!{waitkey}{ret}
